description: Add DynamoDB table and Step Functions I/O handling following strict TDD. Write failing tests first for the DynamoDB table (SleepAudioMetadataTable) and state machine DynamoDB tasks, then implement minimal code to pass them, then update ARCHITECTURE.md.
steps: Step 1 - Add failing tests to cdk-base_test.go: (a) TestDynamoDBTableExists - verify AWS::DynamoDB::Table resource exists with partition key 'audioId' (S), on-demand billing (PAY_PER_REQUEST), server-side encryption enabled, and point-in-time recovery enabled. (b) TestStateMachineDefinitionContainsDynamoDBPutItem - verify the state machine definition includes a DynamoDB PutItem task (look for 'dynamodb:putItem' or 'arn:aws:states:::dynamodb:putItem' in the DefinitionString). (c) TestStateMachineDefinitionContainsDynamoDBUpdateItem - verify the state machine definition includes a DynamoDB UpdateItem task for status updates. (d) TestStateMachineHasDynamoDBPermissions - verify an IAM policy exists granting dynamodb:PutItem and dynamodb:UpdateItem on the table, attached to the state machine role. (e) TestStateMachineDefinitionHasErrorHandling - verify the state machine definition includes Catch or error handling states (e.g., 'Catch' keyword in definition string). Run tests - they should FAIL since the implementation does not exist yet.

Step 2 - Implement the DynamoDB table in cdk-base.go: Add import for 'github.com/aws/aws-cdk-go/awscdk/v2/awsdynamodb'. Create a new DynamoDB table using awsdynamodb.NewTable with: TableName not hardcoded (let CDK generate), PartitionKey with name 'audioId' and type STRING, BillingMode PAY_PER_REQUEST, Encryption DEFAULT (AWS-managed), PointInTimeRecovery true, RemovalPolicy DESTROY (dev skeleton).

Step 3 - Extend the Step Functions state machine definition in cdk-base.go: (a) Add a DynamoDB PutItem task at the START of the chain (before the Polly task) that writes an initial metadata record with audioId (from input via JsonPath), status='PROCESSING', inputBucket, inputKey, and createdAt fields. Use awsstepfunctionstasks.NewDynamoPutItem with the table reference and DynamoAttributeValue mappings. (b) Add a DynamoDB UpdateItem task AFTER the Polly task that updates the record status to 'COMPLETED' and sets updatedAt. Use awsstepfunctionstasks.NewDynamoUpdateItem or a second PutItem/UpdateItem pattern. (c) Add error handling: wrap the Polly task in a parallel or add a Catch clause that transitions to a 'Mark Failed' state which updates DynamoDB status to 'FAILED'. Chain the states: PutItem -> Polly -> UpdateItem(COMPLETED), with a catch on Polly that goes to UpdateItem(FAILED). Use awsstepfunctions Chain, Next, and AddCatch methods.

Step 4 - Update the existing test TestStateMachineDefinitionContainsPollyTask if needed to accommodate the new chain structure (the Polly task is still present but now in a chain with DynamoDB tasks).
Step 5 - Run 'go test -v ./...' to verify all tests pass. Fix any issues.
Step 6 - Run 'cdk synth' to verify the stack synthesizes successfully.

Step 7 - Update ARCHITECTURE.md: (a) Add a 'Metadata Layer' section describing the DynamoDB table (SleepAudioMetadataTable) with partition key audioId, on-demand billing, encryption, and PITR. (b) Update the 'Implemented Components' table to include the DynamoDB table. (c) Update the 'Current State Diagram' Mermaid chart to show: EventBridge -> SFN -> PutItem(DynamoDB) -> Polly -> UpdateItem(DynamoDB), with error path to UpdateItem(FAILED). (d) Update the orchestration layer description to mention the DynamoDB I/O tasks and error handling.
acceptance_criteria: go test -v ./... passes with all new and existing tests green
cdk synth succeeds without errors or warnings
AWS::DynamoDB::Table resource exists in synthesized template with audioId partition key, PAY_PER_REQUEST billing, SSE enabled, PITR enabled
State machine definition includes DynamoDB PutItem task writing initial record with PROCESSING status
State machine definition includes DynamoDB UpdateItem task updating status to COMPLETED
State machine definition includes error handling that updates status to FAILED on error
IAM policy grants dynamodb:PutItem and dynamodb:UpdateItem to the state machine role scoped to the table
ARCHITECTURE.md is updated with metadata layer description, updated Mermaid diagram showing DynamoDB interactions, and updated Implemented Components table
